claim_boundary: Tests policy-layer branch quarantine over native Merkle DAG hashes. Does not claim automatic descendant tombstoning, deletion, literal infinite memory, or production readiness.

protocol.null_hypothesis: Quarantined branch hashes still leak into operational hard-anchor context.
protocol.alternative_hypothesis: Policy-level closure pruning removes the quarantined branch before prompt assembly.

evidence.claim_boundary: pre-prompt active anchor set excludes policy-quarantined branch closure

integrity.note: The run manifest records the final file SHA256. The artifact records a canonical payload hash excluding self-referential integrity fields.
